title: Community Care Apartments
text:
Community Care Apartments - SupportGoWhere
Community Care Apartments
Share link
Senior-friendly housing integrated with care services to support seniors who are 65 and above to age independently within the community.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Homes with pre-installed fittings and senior-friendly design features
Access to services like 24 hour emergency response and other optional paid care services
Apply via the HDB Flat Portal
Collapse all sections
About this support

Flexibility to choose a lease ranging from 15 to 35 years (in 5 year increments) as long as it lasts the applicant(s) and their spouse(s) (if any) until at least age 95.

Eligible first-timers may apply for the Enhanced CPF Housing Grant (Families or Singles) for the flat purchase.

Each unit comes fully furnished and fitted with senior-friendly features including:

Wide and wheelchair-friendly main door with a build-in bench at the side

Wheelchair accessible bathroom fitted with grab bars and slip-resistant flooring

Built-in wardrobe and cabinets

Furnished kitchen (applicances not provided)

Easy-to-slide partitions between rooms for privacy

All residents must subscribe to the Basic Service Package, which includes the help of a community manager who can arrange:

Simple home fixes

Activities at the communal spaces

Basic health checks

24-hour emergency response

Add-on care and support services (at additional costs), e.g. shared caregiving service, medical escort and transport etc.

Who is this for?

Applicant must be a Singapore Citizen (SC)

If you are applying with your spouse, or parent(s)/child(ren), at least one of them must be a SC or Permanent Resident (PR)

If your spouse is not an SC or PR, they must be included as a core occupier

All applicant(s) and their spouse(s) (if any) must be at least 65 years old at the time of HFE letter application

Chosen lease must last all applicant(s) and their spouse(s) (if any) until at least age 95, computed as at the time of HFE letter application.

Monthly household income should not exceed $14,000

Other conditions

If you or any persons listed in the application owns or has an interest in any HDB flat or private residential property, you must dispose of the flat within 6 months from the completion of the flat purchase.

You or any listed applicant(s) and their spouse(s) (if any) are not eligible to buy a Community Care Apartment if you had previously enjoyed 2 or more subsidised housing, one of which was a Studio Apartment or a short lease 2-room Flexi flat or Community Care Apartment.

Additional amount payable

Some applicants will have to make an additional payment on top of the flat price e.g. resale levy. Visit HDB InfoWeb for more details

How to apply?

Check your eligibility by applying for an HDB Flat Eligibility (HFE) letter

Apply online via the HDB Flat Portal during sales launch or open booking of flats, and receive ballot results in up to 2 months' time after applications close

From 4 weeks after the release of ballot results, you will be invited to book a flat and sign the Basic Service Package Agreement

From 6 months after booking a flat, you will be invited to sign the Agreement for Lease

When your booked flat is ready, you will be invited to collect the keys

Where can I find help?

View more details

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 13 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
